sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42789" key="e)rumno/nwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρυμνόνωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n42789.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with fenced back,</tr_> of a crab, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l.for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τερεμνό-</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.196</biblScope> </bibl> (Stat. Flacc.).</sense> </entryFree>
